name: sangfor-fw-v8-0-45
description: OctoBus package for Sangfor firewall V8.0.45 login, blacklist block/unblock, and logout APIs.

Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Login.name: login
Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Login.description: Log in to Sangfor FW V8.0.45 and return a session token.

Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/BlockI.name: block-ip
Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/BlockI.description: Add IP addresses to the Sangfor FW blacklist.

Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Unbloc.name: unblock-ip
Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Unbloc.description: Remove IP addresses from the Sangfor FW blacklist.

Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Logout.name: logout
Sangfor_FW_V8045.Sangfor_FW_V8045/Logout.description: Log out and invalidate a Sangfor FW session token.
